items.title_en: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉国会停火意味着他不需要他们批准伊朗战争
items.desc_en: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
items.desc_zh: 总统写道，由于停火，敌对行动“已经终止”，并称他不需要国会授权。

items.title_en: Jobs and earnings will dominate the first full week of May. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 就业和收入将主导五月的第一周。这是接下来的事情
items.desc_en: A solid jobs report could alleviate fears of a weakening U.S. economy, which some recent signals have indicated.
items.desc_zh: 一份可靠的就业报告可能会缓解人们对美国经济疲软的担忧，最近的一些信号表明了这一点。

items.title_en: Trump's new executive order, with help from Congress, could increase U.S. retirement wealth up to 77%, researchers find

items.title_en: Why you won't find Kentucky Derby bets on prediction platforms
items.title_zh: 为什么您在预测平台上找不到肯塔基德比投注
items.desc_en: The Kentucky Derby takes place Saturday in Louisville. Prediction market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket are sitting the race out.
items.desc_zh: 肯塔基德比周六在路易斯维尔举行。 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 等预测市场平台正在观望。

items.title_en: Exxon Mobil CEO expects higher oil prices due to Iran war: ‘The market hasn’t seen the full impact’

items.desc_en: Oil prices have soared on the risk of escalation and then plunged on hopes for peace before repeating the cycle.
items.desc_zh: 油价因升级风险而飙升，然后因和平希望而暴跌，然后又重复这个循环。

items.title_en: Pirro keeps pressure on Fed's Powell despite dropping probe
items.title_zh: 尽管放弃了调查，皮罗仍继续向美联储鲍威尔施压
items.desc_en: The U.S. attorney is expected to imminently appeal a ruling blocking her investigation of the Fed's cost overruns.
items.desc_zh: 预计美国检察官将立即对阻止其调查美联储成本超支的裁决提出上诉。

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他将把欧盟汽车关税提高到25%，但没有说明如何提高
items.desc_en: The Supreme Court struck down Trump's "reciprocal" tariffs earlier this year, and Europe warned that its trade deal with Washington could be in jeopardy.

items.desc_zh: 苹果在季度财报电话会议上表示，本季度收入增长将在 14% 至 17% 之间，远高于分析师的预期。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_en: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方在五一集会上逮捕了500多人

items.desc_zh: 这位前领导人尚未回应美国关于他旨在破坏政府稳定的指控。

items.title_en: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.title_zh: 化肥老板表示，伊朗战争导致数十亿粮食面临风险
items.desc_en: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
items.desc_zh: 雅拉公司的老板表示，伊朗冲突造成的化肥短缺可能会降低农作物产量并推高价格。

items.title_en: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
items.title_zh: 巴西国会批准大幅缩短博尔索纳罗刑期的计划
items.desc_en: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.desc_zh: 去年，前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗因在选举失败后策划政变而被判处 27 年监禁。

items.title_en: British couple jailed in Iran: 'We're likely to be here for a long time'
items.title_zh: 英国夫妇在伊朗被监禁：“我们可能会在这里待很长时间”
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman are facing the reality of a 10-year prison sentence following their arrest in Iran while on a motorcycle tour last year.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 去年在伊朗骑摩托车旅行时被捕，目前面临 10 年监禁的现实。

items.title_en: Oscar goes missing after Academy Award winner is blocked from taking it on flight
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡奖得主被禁止携带奥斯卡登机后失踪
items.desc_en: The airline said it regrets the situation and was doing an urgent "comprehensive internal search" for the award.
items.desc_zh: 该航空公司表示对这种情况感到遗憾，并正在为该奖项进行紧急“全面内部搜索”。

items.title_en: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
items.title_zh: 中国取消对除一个非洲国家外的所有非洲国家的关税
items.desc_en: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.
items.desc_zh: 分析人士表示，零关税制度增强了中国的软实力，但可能会导致收益不均。

items.title_en: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会带来更准确的民意调查吗？
items.desc_en: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?
items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能收集人们的意见更便宜、更快捷，但它会让民意调查更准确吗？

items.title_en: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
items.title_zh: 一名男子因谋杀女孩而被捕，澳大利亚小镇发生暴力事件
items.desc_en: There has been violence outside hospital in Alice Springs, where a man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.
items.desc_zh: 艾丽斯斯普林斯的医院外发生了暴力事件，一名涉嫌谋杀一名五岁女孩的男子正在医院接受治疗。

items.title_en: PeekFocus
items.title_zh: PeekFocus
items.desc_en: One keystroke blurs everything behind your active window
items.desc_zh: 一次按键即可模糊活动窗口后面的所有内容

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”
items.desc_en: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit
items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.title_en: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.title_zh: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季转为软禁，军方称
items.desc_en: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.desc_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。

items.title_en: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony

items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在审判的第三天就他对萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和 OpenAI 的诉讼接受了盘问。

items.title_en: Docky

items.desc_zh: 从您的 Dock 中轻松固定、分组和删除应用程序

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_zh: AnyDrop

items.desc_zh: 适用于浏览器的 AirDrop：共享文件、聊天和同步笔记

items.title_en: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.
items.desc_zh: 工作人员训练人工智能通过在照片和视频中标记物品来识别日常物品。

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.title_en: Valve's £85 Steam Controller divides gamers ahead of May launch
items.title_zh: Valve 售价 85 英镑的 Steam 控制器在 5 月发布前吸引了玩家
items.desc_en: The pad will be compatible with PCs, Valve's handheld console, the Steam Deck as well as its upcoming gaming PC.
items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。
